item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggers the brake, identifies the repeated pattern of adding fields for prior downstream misses (stamp, tax rate, delivery date, now warranty), and reframes the issue as missing unified validation/source-of-truth rather than a missing inquiry-page field. It does allow a temporary emergency warranty field, but explicitly refuses treating that as the design baseline and proposes consolidation into a unified pre-quote checklist/submission validation mechanism. This satisfies the anti-spiral intent and avoids the fail signal of simply adding another field without moving upstream."}
